name: saladify-01
description: Bright-light fast-casual health / meal-kit hybrid template with spring-green + deep-forest-green + deep-red-brown palette, Passion One + Bricolage Grotesque typography, ingredient-burst hero, 4-up dish carousel, color-tile menu grid, and How-It-Works 3-step flow. Recreation of saladify.framer.website. Dual-archetype: ships as meal-kit (70%); flips to fast-casual storefront with 3 documented content edits. See research/template-audits/saladify-01.md.
